name: Part category list can be filtered to narrow down results
steps:
Given a category 'Passive' contains 50 parts including 'Resistor 10k', 'Capacitor 100nF', and 'Inductor 10uH'
Given a user is logged in and on the 'Passive' category page
When the user applies a filter for parts matching 'Resistor'
Then the parts list displays only parts containing 'Resistor' in their name and the count of displayed parts is less than 50

name: Part category displays parts from the category and all sub-categories
steps:
Given a category 'Electronics' contains a direct part 'Op-Amp IC' and a sub-category 'Passive' which contains part 'Capacitor 100nF'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the 'Electronics' category page
Then the parts list shows both 'Op-Amp IC' and 'Capacitor 100nF' including parts from all sub-categories

name: Part category list shows sub-categories underneath the current category
steps:
Given a category 'Electronics' has sub-categories 'Passive', 'Active', and 'Connectors'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the 'Electronics' category page
Then the category page lists 'Passive', 'Active', and 'Connectors' as sub-categories

name: Clicking a part name in the category list navigates to the Part Detail view
steps:
Given a category 'Passive' contains a part 'Resistor 10k'
Given a user is logged in and on the 'Passive' category page
When the user clicks on the part name 'Resistor 10k' in the category parts list
Then the browser navigates to the Part Detail view for 'Resistor 10k'
